meaning: 威斯特伐利亚[德意志联邦共和国西北部一地区]
examples: Voters in North Rhine-Westphalia will then decide whether to punish Mrs Merkel.
On May 9th elections will be held in North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany’s most populous state.
Spokesmen for Ms. Merkel strenuously deny that North Rhine-Westphalia influenced her tactics on Greece.
The Land of North-Rhine Westphalia recently resolved to sell its 17.5% stake in WestLB.
The North Rhine-Westphalia electoral results will have pundits and pollsters predicting its significance for the capital.
